zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas De Boyd於1360年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可時，他的父親Sir Thomas "The Archer" Boyd 2nd Lord of Kilmarnock62歲，母親Faith or Alice Fleming58歲。他於1375年與Faith or Alice Fleming在英國蘇格蘭皮布萊爾皮布萊斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1410年在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可享年50歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas De Boyd于1360年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可时，他的父亲Sir Thomas "The Archer" Boyd 2nd Lord of Kilmarnock62岁，母亲Faith or Alice Fleming58岁。他于1375年与Faith or Alice Fleming在英国苏格兰皮布萊爾皮布萊斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1410年在英国苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可享年50岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Boyd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the island of Bute in the Firth of Clyde, from Bòid (genitive case of Bòd, the Gaelic name of the island of Bute) or Bòideach, denoting a person from Bute. Alternatively, the name may denote descendants of a Gilla filius Boed, who appears in reference to Glasgow Cathedral in the early 12th century, perhaps from the Gaelic personal name Boite, of uncertain origin.
Scottish and Irish: from the Gaelic epithet buidhe ‘yellow(-haired)’. Compare Bowie .
Manx: from Mac Gille Buidhe ‘son of the yellow-haired lad’ (compare 2 above).

variants.name: Bowie
meanings: Scottish: from Gaelic buidhe ‘yellow’, i.e. ‘yellow-haired’, pronounced as two syllables. The equivalent term in Ireland is buí, often Anglicized as boy. The surname may also be a shortened form of Gilboy .
Irish: Anglicized form of Ó Buadhaigh (see Bogue ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas De Boyd was born in 1360, in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Thomas "The Archer" Boyd 2nd Lord of Kilmarnock, was 62 and his mother, Faith or Alice Fleming, was 58. He married Faith or Alice Fleming in 1375, in Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1410, in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas De Boyd est né en 1360, à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Thomas "The Archer" Boyd 2nd Lord of Kilmarnock, avait 62 ans et sa mère, Faith or Alice Fleming, avait 58 ans. Il a épousé Faith or Alice Fleming en 1375, à Peebles, Valle de Twede, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1410, à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas De Boyd 1360 in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas "The Archer" Boyd 2nd Lord of Kilmarnock 62 und seine Mutter Faith or Alice Fleming 58. Er hat 1375 in Peebles, Peeblesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Faith or Alice Fleming geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1410 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas De Boyd è nato il nel 1360 nel Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Thomas "The Archer" Boyd 2nd Lord of Kilmarnock, aveva 62 anni e il suo madre, Faith or Alice Fleming, aveva 58 anni. Lui sposato Faith or Alice Fleming nel 1375, nel Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1410, nel Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas De Boydが1360年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas "The Archer" Boyd 2nd Lord of Kilmarnockは62歳，母Faith or Alice Flemingは58歳であった。1375年にイギリススコットランドペエブレシュアイアペエブレスでFaith or Alice Flemingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1410年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックで50歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックにて埋葬された。

ko.Kilmartin, Argyll, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 킬마틴
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas De Boyd(이)가 1360년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬마노크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas "The Archer" Boyd 2nd Lord of Kilmarnock(은)는 62세였고, 그의 어머니 Faith or Alice Fleming(은)는 58세였다. 그는 1375년 영국 스코틀랜드 피블레실르 피블레스에서 Faith or Alice Fleming(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1410년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 킬마노크에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬마노크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas De Boyd nasceu em 1360, em Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Thomas "The Archer" Boyd 2nd Lord of Kilmarnock, tinha 62 anos e sua mãe, Faith or Alice Fleming, tinha 58 anos. Ele casou-se com Faith or Alice Fleming em 1375, em Peebles, Peeblesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1410, em Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.Kilmartin, Argyll, Scotland: килмартинь, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas De Boyd родился в 1360 г. в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas "The Archer" Boyd 2nd Lord of Kilmarnock было 62 года, а матери, которую звали Faith or Alice Fleming, 58. Он женился на женщине по имени Faith or Alice Fleming в 1375 г. в местности пиблесь, пиблессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1410 г. в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas De Boyd nació en 1360, en Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Thomas "The Archer" Boyd 2nd Lord of Kilmarnock, tenía 62 años y su mamá, Faith or Alice Fleming, tenía 58 años. Se casó con Faith or Alice Fleming en 1375, en Peebles, Peeblesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1410, en Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland.
